Rule.name: ISDS Set Account Login
Rule.Description: Consolidated rule that generates account identifiers for ISDS provisioning. Dispatches logic based on the provisioned field name (dn, cn, loginItau, employeeNumber) and identity type (partner, service, or default). - dn : full LDAP distinguished name per identity type. - cn : common name only per identity type. - loginItau : unique service CN or itauloginvarejo. - employeeNumber: empty for partner, identity name for service, itaufuncional for others.
